page_title: Product Manager (Early Careers Programme) (m/f/d) - Booksy - Application

detector_only: what are the product management tools that you’re familiar with?
tell me about something you’ve recently learned about a product, technology, or user behaviour. why did you find it interesting? (please do not use ai engines to generate your answer.)
are you available to start a 12-month, full-time programme in september 2026? (please note the start date is not flexible)
are you legally eligible to work in poland without sponsorship?

do you agree that booksy can use the personal data from your application to contact you about future job opportunities for up to 12 months? you understand that this consent is optional and that you can withdraw it at any time. withdrawing your consent will not affect how your data was used before you withdrew it.
